title: Low battery
response: Reduce non-essential loads, command CMD_EPS_PWR_OFF for low-priority channels

title: Battery management fault
response: Power cycle BMS via CMD_EPS_BATT_RESET, monitor TLM_EPS_BATT_V

title: Battery overtemperature
response: Disable charging via CMD_EPS_BATT_TRICKLE rate=0

title: EPS overvoltage
response: Isolate affected channel via CMD_EPS_PWR_OFF

title: ADCS in SAFE
response: Verify spacecraft state, command CMD_ADCS_MODE_SET to recover

title: Body rates exceed nominal
response: Engage detumble via CMD_ADCS_MODE_SET mode=DETUMBLE

title: Reaction wheel saturation
response: Fire magnetorquers via CMD_ADCS_MTQ_FIRE for momentum dump

title: Star tracker lost lock
response: Reissue CMD_ADCS_STAR_TRACK, verify TLM_ADCS_STAR_LOCK

title: Link degraded
response: Switch RF band via CMD_COMM_TX_ENABLE, increase power via CMD_COMM_TX_POWER

title: High BER
response: Reduce data rate, switch to redundant transmitter

title: CPU overload
response: Suspend non-essential tasks, dump task list

title: Memory low
response: Run cleanup, delete temp files via CMD_CDH_FILE_DELETE

title: Watchdog reset
response: Inspect TLM_CDH_BOOT_COUNT, dump memory via CMD_CDH_MEM_DUMP

title: Memory ECC error
response: Dump affected region, schedule CMD_CDH_MEM_PATCH if persistent

title: Thermal high
response: Engage radiator, reduce active loads

title: Thermal low
response: Enable heaters via CMD_THERMAL_HTR_ON

title: Detector hot
response: Suspend imaging, allow cooldown, monitor TLM_PAYLOAD_INST_TEMP

title: Instrument fault
response: Power cycle via CMD_PAYLOAD_INST_OFF then CMD_PAYLOAD_INST_ON

title: Buffer full
response: Initiate dump via CMD_COMM_DUMP_START

title: Tank overpressure
response: Vent via CMD_PROP_VALVE_OPEN, monitor TLM_PROP_TANK_P

title: Tank underpressure
response: Halt all burn planning, escalate to engineering

title: Propellant cold
response: Enable propellant heater via CMD_THERMAL_HTR_ON id=PROP
